name: Aswan Governorate (Egypt)

colors.symbolism: the Nile and Lake Nasser, central to Aswan's geography and identity
the desert sands and the sun of Upper Egypt; Aswan's ancient monuments

description: A light blue field charged in the centre with two yellow stylised Nubian figures flanking a central element, the emblem of Aswan Governorate.
history: The flag of Aswan Governorate features a stylised emblem evoking Nubian heritage on a Nile-blue field, adopted as part of the system of governorate flags introduced in the 2000s.

features.symbolism: the Nile and Lake Nasser at Aswan
stylised Nubian figures representing Aswan's Nubian heritage and the ancient peoples of the upper Nile region
